final_prompt.prompt:
[@image:#1:photo_٢٠٢٦-٠٤-٢٢_١١-٢٧-٣٣]
Place the provided flower bouquet exactly as it is, preserving all original details, colors, textures, and shape without any modification. Position it in a luxury white studio setting with a clean, minimal background. Ensure the bouquet is straight, well-balanced, and naturally positioned as if placed realistically in real life. Use soft, professional studio lighting with gentle, elegant shadows to enhance depth and realism. The composition should look high-end, refined, and suitable for a premium brand. Ensure ultra-high resolution and sharp focus. Format the image in Instagram post size (1080x1350, 4:5 ratio). The final result should look like a polished, realistic, professional photoshoot.
